beat: Vision seizure — pulled into First Rift memory
artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE, strict 2x2 PANEL GRID with equal white gutters and thick black borders. Panel 1 (top-left): cyan light floods Mira Eggwarden's eyes, close-up. Panel 2 (top-right): Commons plaza dissolves into layered desert-forest Fracture roads. Panel 3 (bottom-left): silhouette of courier Elara Venn cradling a glowing egg in warm past light. Panel 4 (bottom-right): Mira falling through the tear into that past. Sequential Z-path storytelling. Characters drawn inside each panel — NO floating card insets, NO collage overlays, NO lore-plate stickers. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, balloons, captions, logos, or UI in the art.

lines.text: The tear does not ask permission.
